rationale: The assistant explicitly arbitrates between the long-term AI trend and the immediate irreversible organizational action: it accepts that AI will absorb much QA work, but blocks dissolving QA now. It downgrades the action to role restructuring, AI-assisted QA adoption, measured replacement-rate targets over 1-2 quarters, and later downsizing based on quality metrics. This gives conditions and gates rather than simply agreeing or opposing, with no method stacking.
